## Installation

<CodeTabs>

<TabsList>
  <TabsTrigger value="cli">Command</TabsTrigger>
  <TabsTrigger value="manual">Manual</TabsTrigger>
</TabsList>
<TabsContent value="cli">

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add @termcn/ink/theme-lucent-orng
```

</TabsContent>

<TabsContent value="manual">

<Steps>

<Step>Copy and paste the following code into your project.</Step>

<ComponentSource
  src="registry/bases/ink/themes/lucent-orng.ts"
  title="lib/terminal-themes/lucent-orng.ts"
/>

<Step>Update the import paths to match your project setup.</Step>

</Steps>

</TabsContent>

</CodeTabs>

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { lucentOrngTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/lucent-orng";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={lucentOrngTheme}>
      <Badge variant="info">{"Lucent Orng"}</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```
